title: hieracium jurassicum subsp. cichoriaceum
intro: Hieracium jurassicum subsp. cichoriaceum, also known as the Jurassic Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium jurassicum subsp. cichoriaceum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
